zh.lifeSummary: Anne於1612年出生在英國。她於大約1637年與Edward Stevenson在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1670年12月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼昆斯紐托享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anne于1612年出生在英国。她于大约1637年与Edward Stevenson在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1670年12月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼昆斯紐托享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York

en.lifeSummary: Anne was born in 1612, in England. She married Edward Stevenson about 1637, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in December 1670, in Newtown, Queens, New York Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 58.

ko.lifeSummary: Anne(은)는 1612년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1637년 영국에서 Edward Stevenson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1670년 12월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 퀸스 뉴타운에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Anne родилась в 1612 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Stevenson около 1637 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла декабрь 1670 г. в местности нютоун, куинс, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 58 лет.
